title: Set up A Board with Horizontal Pipeline (Nonprofit)

posts.author: barrio_botany (Christina)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello…I am a newbie from a garden education nonprofit and have a question about initial setup of our Monday boards.

I made a hortizontal board with our curriculum development process that includes the following steps:

Lesson Drafted
Collateral Materials Drafted
Internal Team Review
Credentialed Teacher Review
Revisions
Final Proofreading
Final Draft Approval

For each step there are a number of unique tasks
